description: You'll find a classic foot-style choice for men without overtly fussy overlays from this clean-cut pair from arrow. Neat silhouetting on this understated shoe adds a masculine feel to all formal outfits showing off the minimalistic trend of the moment. Wear this with formal trousers and a shirt or with denims, a light hued shirt, a structured blazer and an understated belt Upper Genuine leather upper with reinforced overlays on the heel collar Brand button on the lateral side of the midfoot Central lace up system Soft sockliner for instep comfort Leather lining Padded tongue Midsole Shock absorbing EVA midsole Outsole TPR outsole with heel Terraced grooves on the midfoot for grip and traction Wash care Wipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth Do not machine wash
